text.message: You’re the biggest threat atm, as you will get longest road

No 9s or 10s this game is terrible

So why do you keep crying
How have I ended up with army lol
And then you have purple trying to take my road when blue or white is clear winner

But for me to block you’re both about level imo
If white mono’s to eventually take road I would respect it greatly
